mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO yearly_result ( config_id, year, real_balance_krw, annual_profit, total_profit, return_rate ) VALUES
( #{item.configId}, #{item.year}, #{item.realBalanceKrw}, #{item.annualProfit}, #{item.totalProfit}, #{item.returnRate} )
mapper.select: SELECT result_id AS resultId, config_id AS configId, year, real_balance_krw AS realBalanceKrw, annual_profit AS annualProfit, total_profit AS totalProfit, return_rate AS returnRate FROM yearly_result WHERE config_id = #{configId} ORDER BY year ASC
